ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HICKEY & MOUTOUX, APC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,778.00 FILED BY COMBS & GREENLEY/ LEGALINK, INC AS TO DEFENDANT HICKEY & MOUTOUX, APC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY MOUTOUX, DAVID T. HEARING SET FOR OCT-02-2003 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX OFF CALENDAR PER PLTF'S REQUEST. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED & NO APPEARANCE OF DEFT.
